creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 222276
patch with STRIP_CMD and ordered Makefile vars

Hi Hannes,

Thanks for the patch!

I added STRIP_CMD for bin/ocaml-installer, as suggested from 'make DEVELOPER=yes'.

While here, I also ordered Makefile vars, as suggested by portclippy ;)

If you agree, I would commit with these changes.
